description_long: This is a large, elegant sofa upholstered in a deep blue fabric, featuring a classic diamond-tufted pattern along the backrest and inner armrests. The sofa has a single, smooth seat cushion that spans its entire width, providing a streamlined and unified seating area. The armrests are rolled and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a continuous, enveloping profile. Four slender, tapered legs, likely made of wood, support the sofa at each corner, slightly elevating it off the ground. The overall design is sophisticated and traditional, with a focus on comfort and visual appeal. The upholstery appears soft and matte, with subtle sheen from the tufted detailing.
description: A large, deep blue sofa with diamond-tufted back and arms, a single smooth seat cushion, and rolled armrests, supported by four tapered wooden legs. The design is classic and elegant, with a soft, matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, diamond-tufted backrest and arms, and the single smooth seat cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rolled armrest, the depth of the seat, and the tapered leg at the front corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned back panel and the four supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the rolled armrest and seat depth from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion with attached, diamond-tufted back and armrest padding; all cushions are uniform and integrated.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered and diamond-tufted, with a classic, enveloping profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, tapered legs positioned at each corner, likely wooden with a dark finish, slightly angled outward and fully exposed.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a straight top edge, fully diamond-tufted and integrated with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Diamond-tufted upholstery on the backrest and armrests, with a smooth, solid blue fabric on the seat cushion; no visible decorative stitching beyond the tufting.
